name_cn:
【New Pink Tiger New Size】
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents a look that adds a highlight to any outfit~ This mini size is so cute! The small bag shape is also very convenient for holding small odds and ends~ Who wears it is stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
